resources.string: Understand what the market is saying before you react.
Search a stock, read the latest company headlines, and review an AI-supported rise-or-fall opinion with a clear risk warning.
Enter stock symbol or company name
Enter a stock symbol or company name.
Analyze a stock to see current news, AI summary, and the app’s directional opinion.
StockScope does not cover trading risks, portfolio suitability, taxes, or execution risk. Every rise-or-fall signal in this app is only an opinion, not financial advice.
Your watchlist is empty. Save a stock from the analysis tab to keep it here.
